title: Seek Pages deploy bootstrap env propagation
summary: Extend the existing governance env bootstrap surface so Seek and Ponder generated env files include the Cloudflare Pages credential names required by the governed Pages deploy wrapper.
acceptance_criteria: Seek bootstrap targets emit CLOUDFLARE_PAGES_TOKEN and CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID by name without printing or committing secret values.
Bootstrap contract, execution scope, provisioning evidence, structured plan, closeout, and Local CI Gate checks pass.
Live deploy proof remains delegated to the existing hldpro-governance #471 / seek-and-ponder #163 downstream deployment lane.
